auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Stability AI API key used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create or copy it from https://platform.stability.ai/account/keys.

actions.name: text_to_audio
actions.description: Generate audio from a text prompt with Stability AI and store the generated file locally.

prompt.description: The text description used to generate audio.

duration.description: The requested duration of the generated audio in seconds.

seed.description: The randomness seed used for generation. Use 0 or omit it for a random seed.

steps.description: The number of sampling steps requested from Stability AI. Use 30-100 for stable-audio-2 and 4-8 for stable-audio-2.5.

cfgScale.description: How strongly the generation should follow the prompt text.

model.description: The Stable Audio model to use for generation.

outputFormat.description: The output audio format returned by Stability AI.

downloadUrl.description: The local URL for downloading the generated file.

sizeBytes.description: The generated file size in bytes.

file.description: A generated audio file stored in local transit storage.

model.description: The Stable Audio model to use for generation.

outputFormat.description: The output audio format returned by Stability AI.

contentType.description: The MIME type returned by Stability AI.

seed.description: The seed returned by Stability AI for this generation.

finishReason.description: The completion reason returned by Stability AI.

outputSchema.description: The generated Stability AI audio response.
